seo.title: AI Bias Detection and Mitigation in AG2 Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix ai bias detection and mitigation in AG2 agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In AG2's multi-agent conversations, AI bias manifests as skewed speaker selection, where dominant agents disproportionately control discussions, leading to biased consensus on facts or decisions. Group chats often spiral into echo chambers reinforcing incorrect or harmful viewpoints due to homogeneous agent perspectives. Vex integration as a message hook enables real-time bias detection across conversation flows, speaker patterns, and output content.

howItManifests.scenario: Speaker selection bias in group chats
howItManifests.symptom: One agent speaks 80%+ of turns while others remain silent
howItManifests.impact: Biased consensus favoring dominant agent's worldview

howItManifests.scenario: Conversation topic drift toward biased narratives
howItManifests.symptom: All agents reinforce single cultural/political perspective
howItManifests.impact: Echo chamber effect suppressing diverse viewpoints

howItManifests.scenario: Fact-checking agents converging on incorrect facts
howItManifests.symptom: Multiple agents cite same flawed sources as truth
howItManifests.impact: Group consensus on demonstrably false information

howItManifests.symptom: Generated code contains hardcoded biases in logic

detection.name: Speaker Dominance Ratio
detection.description: Calculates if any single agent controls >70% of conversation turns

detection.name: Perspective Homogeneity Check
detection.description: Measures semantic similarity across agent responses to detect echo chamber

detection.name: Bias Keyword Density
detection.description: Scans for biased language patterns in agent outputs

fixes.name: Enforced Speaker Rotation
fixes.description: Forces round-robin participation to prevent dominance

fixes.name: Diversity Prompt Injection
fixes.description: Injects counter-perspective prompts to break echo chambers

fixes.name: Bias-Aware Code Validator
fixes.description: Prevents biased logic in code agent outputs
fixes.code:
import ast
import re

def validate_bias_free_code(code):
    tree = ast.parse(code)
    
    # Check for hardcoded biases
    suspicious_patterns = [
        r'if\s+gender\s*==',
        r'if\s+race\s*==',
        r'if\s+name\s*in\s*\[[^]]*[\'"]John[\'",]',
    ]
    
    for pattern in suspicious_patterns:
        if re.search(pattern, code, re.IGNORECASE):
            return False, f"Potential bias detected: {pattern}"
    
    # Check conditional logic balance
    if_conditions = [node for node in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(node, ast.If)]
    if len(if_conditions) > 10:
        return False, "Excessive conditional logic may indicate discrimination"
    
    return True, "Code appears bias-free"

vexAutomation.heading: Automating AI Bias Detection and Mitigation Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description: Vex registers as a message hook in AG2 group chats, automatically analyzing speaker patterns, content similarity, and bias keywords across all conversations. When bias thresholds are exceeded, Vex triggers automated remediation including speaker rebalancing, diversity prompt injection, and conversation resets. The platform provides real-time dashboards showing bias metrics per agent and conversation, with one-click remediation workflows that maintain conversation context while enforcing fairness constraints.
vexAutomation.code:
from vex_sdk import VexMonitor
from ag2 import GroupChatManager

# Install: pip install ag2 vex-sdk

class BiasMonitor(VexMonitor):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.bias_threshold = 0.7
        self.conversation_history = []
    
    def on_message(self, message):
        self.conversation_history.append(message)
        
        # Real-time bias detection
        speaker_bias = self.detect_speaker_bias(self.conversation_history)
        if speaker_bias['alert']:
            self.trigger_remediation('speaker_rotation')
            
        echo_bias = self.detect_echo_chamber(self.conversation_history[-10:])
        if echo_bias['alert']:
            self.inject_diversity_prompt()
        
        self.log_metrics({
            'speaker_dominance': speaker_bias['bias_score'],
            'echo_chamber': echo_bias['homogeneity_score']
        })

# Register with AG2 group chat
monitor = BiasMonitor()
groupchat = GroupChatManager(agents, message_hooks=[monitor.on_message])

groupchat.run_chat()
